ecosystem.description: 8-repo monorepo ecosystem for FlexGrafik — multi-agent orchestration, AI automation, WordPress e-commerce, canvas gaming, and system tooling.

projects.name: Agent OS
projects.description: LangGraph workflow: Planner → Coder → Tester → Reviewer (HITL) → Summarizer. Hybrid VPS + local runner. PostgreSQL on prod.

projects.name: Agent OS UI
projects.description: Next.js dashboard for managing agent tasks, viewing health status, and approving HITL gates.

projects.name: ZZPackage Wizard
projects.description: WordPress/WooCommerce wizard-only shop for ZZP professionals. SSoT-driven with product-master-table.json, hard guardrails GUARD_01-04, and manual GHA deploy gates.

projects.name: FlexGrafik App (Advergame)
projects.description: Custom Canvas engine in React. Side-scroller game as a lead magnet for FlexGrafik services. Feature flags, asset pipeline, proxy to WordPress API.
guardrails: Feature flags for all new features

projects.name: Flex-VCMS
projects.description: Node.js orchestrator: vcms-scan.js generates ecosystem maps + conflict detection. SSoT for all daily operations. LLM Gateway bridging all repos.

projects.name: Jadzia Core
projects.description: FastAPI backend for AI automation. Multi-LLM integration (Anthropic, Google GenAI). JWT auth, SSH automation via Paramiko.
guardrails: Stage 2 DONE — not yet on prod

projects.name: FlexGrafik Meta
projects.description: Meta-repo containing all global rules, brand guidelines, agent hierarchy, tool bindings, and master plan for the entire ecosystem.

projects.name: WorkFlow
projects.description: Program office repo: todo.json backlog, skill plans, verification docs, strategy. Daily operations start here.

engineering_patterns.name: AGENTS.md in every repo
engineering_patterns.description: Each repository has an AGENTS.md file defining guardrails, SOPs, and workflow rules for AI agents operating in that context.

engineering_patterns.name: Handoff Documentation
engineering_patterns.description: Every session ends with a handoff doc in docs/handoffs/. Proof-of-done, next steps, and state for the next agent or developer.

engineering_patterns.name: SESSION-ANCHOR
engineering_patterns.description: State map and command reference for agents. Single file that tells any agent the exact current state of the project and what commands to run.

engineering_patterns.name: brain.md
engineering_patterns.description: Project context, decisions, and intent. Compressed knowledge base for agents entering a codebase cold.

engineering_patterns.name: SSoT Enforcement
engineering_patterns.description: One source of truth per domain. Zero divergence. product-master-table.json, ecosystem.json, repos.yaml — each is the canonical source.

engineering_patterns.name: Spec-Driven Development
engineering_patterns.description: todo.json as executable spec. Verification docs before deploy. Specs are not suggestions — they are contracts.

engineering_patterns.name: Bounded Autonomy
engineering_patterns.description: AI acts, human decides. HITL gates at every deployment boundary. Zasada 11: no autonomous production deploys.

engineering_patterns.name: Manual Deploy (Zasada 11)
engineering_patterns.description: No agent deploys to production autonomously. Every production deploy requires explicit human approval. Non-negotiable.
